_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type the text markdown: [example](https://example.com) into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the agent message to render. The first anchor inside the last agent message (".message-agent a") should have href "https://example.com", target "_blank", and rel "noopener noreferrer".
